text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I lost! O Shiraoki, why didst thou
desert me?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What if Shiraoki was asleep or something? I can't
have a god that's napping on the job!
choice_data_list: Let's do our best next time.
Maybe your skills are being put to the test.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nngh, okay... It just wasn't my lucky day, I guess.
What can you do?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I just hope Shiraoki will be awake next time around.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Say what?! Are you suggesting that the great
Shiraoki wished to see how I perform without
good fortune on my side?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! Doesn't this mean I've completely messed
up?! Shiraoki must be so disappointed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I need to get back on track! I'm definitely taking
first next race... Or, at least second!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Matikanefukukitaru's feet to the fire, we
make a vow to come out victorious next time.
